title: Policy: Policy applied - Logout - Settings stay locked
scenario: Locked policy settings persist after user logs out of tenant in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in to a tenant account that has a device policy applied with certain settings locked (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings and verify that the locked settings are grayed out or non-interactive.
4. Log out of the tenant account from the app (Account → Log Out).
5. After logout, navigate again to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
6. Observe the state of the previously locked settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
expected: After logging out of the tenant, the settings that were locked by the device policy should become unlocked and editable in the app.
